---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or an enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature you want.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? Describe the problem it solves or the workflow it enables.

## Proposed API

If applicable, sketch how you imagine using the feature:

```python
from SoupX import my_new_function

result = my_new_function(sc, param1=value1)
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Related work

Links to related papers, R package functions, or other implementations that informed this request.

## Additional context

Any other context, figures, or references.
